description_long: This object is a compact quadcopter drone with a cylindrical central body and four circular propeller guards, each housing a single rotor. The main body appears to be constructed from a hard, lightweight material, likely a composite or polymer, and features a prominent camera module at the front with two visible lenses. The underside of the drone is equipped with a mechanical arm or gimbal, possibly for stabilization or manipulation tasks. The propeller guards are robust and designed to protect the rotors during flight in urban environments. The drone's design suggests it is intended for surveillance, inspection, or light delivery tasks, with a focus on maneuverability and safety. The overall color scheme is a combination of light gray and black, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance.
description: A modern quadcopter drone with a cylindrical body, four protected rotors, and a front-facing dual-lens camera. It features a mechanical arm or gimbal underneath and a gray-black color scheme.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical body, two propeller guards, and the mechanical arm beneath the drone.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual-lens camera module and the symmetrical arrangement of the four propeller guards.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the cylindrical body and propeller guards.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the cylindrical body and the mechanical arm, with the propeller guards encircling the rotors.
